examples: I am reluctant to trust anyone totally, Your Excellency.
Let us have a few minutes' break, and Your Excellency may do what you want to.
He does not mourn the demise of that world liberated from court etiquette, he says, he can call someone an "idiot" if he wants, instead of "Your Excellency".
I'm joined now by the Ambassador in London, His Excellency Hatem Seif El Nasr.
She also thanked His Excellency Ambassador Aldrees for his continued personal commitment and efforts.
